category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a regular expressions library; official README at https://github.com/kkos/oniguruma says Oniguruma is a modern and flexible regular expressions library.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use the name Oniguruma at https://github.com/kkos/oniguruma; source_facts.name is oniguruma.
docs_sources: Official README at https://github.com/kkos/oniguruma points users to doc/API for the Oniguruma API and includes doc/SYNTAX.md in the repository documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/kkos/oniguruma, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README at https://github.com/kkos/oniguruma describe a regular expression library with multiple character encodings and API documentation.
